images.label: MapleGroveSeer
images.prompt: A lone young man in Ming-inspired dark silk robes stands in an autumnal wild maple forest at night, lantern light casting long shadows; his eyes glow faintly silver, revealing invisible spectral threads—some luminous silver, others frayed gray—rising from the ground and vanishing into misty air; cyberpunk-infused xianxia aesthetic, cinematic wide-angle composition, chiaroscuro lighting with deep indigo and crimson tones, fog veiling distant trees, wind-blown red leaves suspended mid-air.

images.label: NoThreadMan
images.prompt: A gaunt middle-aged man in tattered gray scholar's robe kneels beneath a gnarled ancient maple tree, face buried in knees, shoulders trembling; no ethereal thread extends from his body—unlike surrounding faint silver or gray spectral lines visible only to the viewer; anime-style with ink-wash sci-fi embellishment, tight medium shot, moody low-key lighting dominated by lantern amber and cold moonlight blue, shallow depth of field, falling crimson leaves blurred in background, subtle digital glitch overlay on the figure’s silhouette.

images.label: VoidPerception
images.prompt: Close-up profile of沈渊 (23, sharp-featured, black hair tied simply, pale skin, faint bioluminescent veins tracing temples) gazing intently at the empty space where a ghost should emit a冥线; behind him, translucent overlays reveal dozens of floating silver and ashen filaments rising from forest floor into void—except one stark void around a fading gray figure; sci-fi ink-painting hybrid style, vertical composition, dramatic rim lighting from off-screen lantern, high contrast, desaturated crimson and charcoal palette, micro-detail on robe embroidery and leaf veins, zero text or UI elements.
